# Load the JSON files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json"

import json, io
with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)
with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

len(quran), len(hadith)

import re, unicodedata

arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0657-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06DC\u06DF-\u06ED\u08D4-\u08FF]')  # include some marks

def normalize_ar(text):
    if text is None:
        return ''
    # remove diacritics
    text = arabic_diacritics.sub('', text)
    # unify hamza/alef forms
    # replace ligature allah? We'll skip.
    replacements = {
        'أ':'ا','إ':'ا','آ':'ا','ٱ':'ا',
        'ى':'ي',
        'ؤ':'و','ئ':'ي','ء':'',
        'ـ':'',
        'ة':'ه',
        'ٮ':'ب', # not present usually
        '\u0640':'', # tatweel
    }
    for k,v in replacements.items():
        text = text.replace(k,v)
    # Remove punctuation and non-letters/digits spaces
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\u0600-\u06FF]+', ' ', text)
    # collapse spaces
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

def lcs_len(a, b):
    # lengths
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    # dynamic programming memory-optimized
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1,n+1):
        prev = 0
        ai = a[i-1]
        for j in range(1,m+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                if dp[j] < dp[j-1]:
                    dp[j] = dp[j-1]
            prev = temp
    return dp[m]

def similarity_lcs(a,b):
    if not a or not b:
        return 0.0
    lcs = lcs_len(a,b)
    return lcs / max(len(a),len(b))

def token_f1(a,b):
    # token sets
    toks_a = normalize_ar(a).split()
    toks_b = normalize_ar(b).split()
    if not toks_a or not toks_b:
        return 0.0
    set_a = toks_a
    set_b = toks_b
    # compute overlap multiset intersection size
    from collections import Counter
    ca, cb = Counter(set_a), Counter(set_b)
    inter = sum((ca & cb).values())
    precision = inter / len(set_a)
    recall = inter / len(set_b)
    if precision+recall==0: 
        return 0.0
    return 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)

orig = "وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ رُسُلًا إِلَى قَوْمِهِمْ فَزادَهُمْ عُضَالًا وَجَزَعًا"
norm_orig = normalize_ar(orig)
norm_orig[:120], norm_orig

# Build list of normalized ayah texts with indices
norm_ayahs = [normalize_ar(a['ayah_text']) for a in quran]
# Find those containing "ولقد ارسلنا من قبلك رسلا"
query = normalize_ar("ولقد أرسلنا من قبلك رسلا")
matches_idx = [i for i, t in enumerate(norm_ayahs) if query in t]
len(matches_idx), matches_idx[:20]

candidate = quran[i]['ayah_text']
sim = similarity_lcs(normalize_ar(orig), normalize_ar(candidate))
sim, token_f1(orig, candidate)

common_prefix = "وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ رُسُلًا إِلَى قَوْمِهِمْ"
normalize_ar(common_prefix), len(normalize_ar(common_prefix)), len(normalize_ar(candidate))
